heading: Criminal contempt
label: 3285 Criminal contempt
text: No proceeding for criminal contempt within shall be instituted against any person, corporation or association unless begun within one year from the date of the act complained of; nor shall any such proceeding be a bar to any criminal prosecution for the same act.section 402 of this title
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on , U.S.C., 1940 ed., Judicial Code and Judiciary (, ).section 390 of title 28Oct. 15, 1914, ch. 323, § 2538 Stat. 740Word “criminal” was inserted before “contempt” in first line. Words “within ” were inserted after “contempt”.section 402 of this titleThe correct meaning and narrow application of title 28, U.S.C., 1940 ed., § 390, are preserved, as section 389 of that title is incorporated in sections 402 and 3691 of this title.Words “corporation or association” were inserted after “person”, thus embodying applicable definition of , U.S.C., 1940 ed.
